scripts.dev: sh -c 'APP_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3100 DATABASE_HOST=zachs-mac-mini.taila0b849.ts.net DATABASE_PORT=5435 DISABLE_SERVER_JOB_RUNNER=true bun --cwd apps/server --env-file="$PWD/.env" --watch src/index.ts & server_pid=$!; VITE_SERVER_ORIGIN= bun run --cwd apps/website dev --strictPort --port 3100 & website_pid=$!; trap "kill $server_pid $website_pid 2>/dev/null" INT TERM EXIT; while kill -0 $server_pid 2>/dev/null && kill -0 $website_pid 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; kill $server_pid $website_pid 2>/dev/null; wait $server_pid $website_pid 2>/dev/null'
scripts.cli:build: bun run http-client:build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
